name: osc_tool
description: OSC test tool for Unreal Engine and Resolume Arena

scripts.electron:compile: esbuild electron/main.ts electron/preload.ts electron/ipc-handlers.ts electron/osc-manager.ts electron/endpoints-store.ts electron/deck-store.ts electron/diagnostics.ts electron/web-server.ts electron/auto-updater.ts --outdir=electron --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external
scripts.electron:dev: pnpm electron:compile && concurrently "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:build: pnpm electron:compile:prod && pnpm build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:release: pnpm electron:compile:prod && pnpm build && electron-builder --publish always
